data.body: PASS 1 review note (T1 prior-art/novel-architecture): this plan moves the reconciler's cross-clone coordination off its current medium (the shared `tickets` branch, where lock/gate/bindings files are made visible to all clones via `git show tickets:<file>` + CAS ref-advance — see `_advisory_lock.py`). The plan acknowledges "the reconciler currently coordinates cross-clone partly VIA these shared-branch files; moving them off-branch changes that coordination and needs its own design pass" but defers the replacement design entirely and considers no prior art for an off-branch distributed-coordination mechanism. Surfacing this as a coaching finding below (severity computed in a later pass).
